languages.text: {n}Эоганн вспыхивает возмущением, готовясь разразиться патетической тирадой... но внезапно осекается, удрученно глядя на сервочереп.{/n} "Очень жаль, Вольный Торговец, но я подчинюсь вашему решению. Ты прав, Нунциус. Масштабирование непроверенных решений может привести к печальным последствиям".

{n}Eogunn flares with indignation, poised to launch into an impassioned tirade... but abruptly catches himself, instead gazing dejectedly at the servo-skull.{/n} "Very well, Rogue Trader. I will submit to your decision. You are right, Nuncius. Scaling unproven solutions could lead to unfortunate consequences."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн вспыхивает возмущением, готовясь разразиться патетической тирадой... но внезапно осекается, удрученно глядя на сервочереп.{/n} "Очень жаль, Вольный Торговец, но я подчинюсь вашему решению. Ты прав, Нунциус. Масштабирование непроверенных решений может привести к печальным последствиям".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn flares with indignation, poised to launch into a pathetic tirade... but suddenly catches himself, gazing dejectedly at the servo-skull.{/n} "Very well, Rogue Trader. I shall submit to your decision. You are right, Nuntius. Scaling unproven solutions could lead to unfortunate consequences."

I will submit to your decision. You are right, Nuncius. Scaling unproven solutions could lead to unfortunate consequences."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn ist sichtlich empört und setzt zu einer pathetischen Tirade an ... hält dann aber inne und wirft einen deprimierten Blick auf den Servoschädel.{/n} "Also schön, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich werde Eure Entscheidung akzeptieren. Ihr habt recht, Nuncius. Das Beharren auf unerprobten Lösungen könnte unerfreuliche Konsequenzen nach sich ziehen."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn flares with indignation, poised to launch into an impassioned tirade... but abruptly catches himself, instead gazing dejectedly at the servo-skull.{/n} "Very well, Rogue Trader. I will submit to your decision. You are right, Nuncius. Scaling unproven solutions could lead to unfortunate consequences."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn ist sichtlich empört und setzt zu einer pathetischen Tirade an ... hält dann aber inne und wirft einen deprimierten Blick auf den Servoschädel.{/n} "Also schön, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich werde Eure Entscheidung akzeptieren. Ihr habt recht, Nuncius. Das Beharren auf unerprobten Lösungen könnte unerfreuliche Konsequenzen nach sich ziehen."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn bouillonne d'indignation, prêt à se lancer dans une tirade passionnée... mais se ravise brusquement et se met à fixer le servocrâne d'un air abattu.{/n} « Très bien, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je me soumets à cette décision. Tu as raison, Nuncius. L'application de solutions qui n'ont pas fait leurs preuves pourrait avoir des conséquences désastreuses. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn flares with indignation, poised to launch into an impassioned tirade... but abruptly catches himself, instead gazing dejectedly at the servo-skull.{/n} "Very well, Rogue Trader. I will submit to your decision. You are right, Nuncius. Scaling unproven solutions could lead to unfortunate consequences."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn bouillonne d'indignation, prêt à se lancer dans une tirade passionnée... mais se ravise brusquement et se met à fixer le servocrâne d'un air abattu.{/n} « Très bien, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je me soumets à cette décision. Tu as raison, Nuncius. L'application de solutions qui n'ont pas fait leurs preuves pourrait avoir des conséquences désastreuses. »

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡愤然变色，他正要发出一场义愤填膺的激烈控诉……却又突然打住，转而垂头丧气地盯着伺服头骨。{/n}“好吧，行商浪人。我服从您的决定。努恩修斯，你是对的，推广未经证实的方案，确实可能导致不幸的后果。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn flares with indignation, poised to launch into an impassioned tirade... but abruptly catches himself, instead gazing dejectedly at the servo-skull.{/n} "Very well, Rogue Trader. I will submit to your decision. You are right, Nuncius. Scaling unproven solutions could lead to unfortunate consequences."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡愤然变色，他正要发出一场义愤填膺的激烈控诉……却又突然打住，转而垂头丧气地盯着伺服头骨。{/n}“好吧，行商浪人。我服从您的决定。努恩修斯，你是对的，推广未经证实的方案，确实可能导致不幸的后果。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn se muestra indignado y se dispone a soltar una perorata apasionada... pero de pronto se recompone y mira alicaído al servocráneo.{/n} «De acuerdo, Comerciante Independiente, acataré su decisión. Nuncius está en lo cierto. Ampliar soluciones de eficacia no demostrada podría tener consecuencias trágicas».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn flares with indignation, poised to launch into an impassioned tirade... but abruptly catches himself, instead gazing dejectedly at the servo-skull.{/n} "Very well, Rogue Trader. I will submit to your decision. You are right, Nuncius. Scaling unproven solutions could lead to unfortunate consequences."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn se muestra indignado y se dispone a soltar una perorata apasionada... pero de pronto se recompone y mira alicaído al servocráneo.{/n} «De acuerdo, Comerciante Independiente, acataré su decisión. Nuncius está en lo cierto. Ampliar soluciones de eficacia no demostrada podría tener consecuencias trágicas».

languages.text: {n}エオガンは憤怒に燃え、情けない暴言を吐こうとしたが......不意に思いとどまり、代わりに意気消沈してサーヴォスカルを見つめた。{/n}「いいだろう、ローグ・トレーダー。私はあなたの決定に従う。君の言うとおりだ、ヌンキウス。証明されていない解決策を拡大解釈することは、不幸な結果を招きかねない。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn flares with indignation, poised to launch into an impassioned tirade... but abruptly catches himself, instead gazing dejectedly at the servo-skull.{/n} "Very well, Rogue Trader. I will submit to your decision. You are right, Nuncius. Scaling unproven solutions could lead to unfortunate consequences."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn öfkeyle parlıyor, hararetli bir nutuk çekmeye hazırlanıyor... Ancak aniden kendini toparlayıp bunun yerine hizmelete umutsuzca bakıyor.{/n} "Pekâlâ Hür Tacir. Kararınıza uyacağım. Haklısın Nuncius. Kanıtlanmamış çözümleri ölçeklendirmek, talihsiz sonuçlara yol açabilir."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn flares with indignation, poised to launch into an impassioned tirade... but abruptly catches himself, instead gazing dejectedly at the servo-skull.{/n} "Very well, Rogue Trader. I will submit to your decision. You are right, Nuncius. Scaling unproven solutions could lead to unfortunate consequences."
